name: Trinity Chapel Thika
scripture: For the word of God is alive and active. Sharper than any double-edged sword, it penetrates even to dividing soul and spirit, joints and marrow; it judges the thoughts and attitudes of the heart.
communityStatement: We are a community of people loving each other and our Lord. We grow to be completely humble and gentle, patient, bearing with one another in love.

deep.description: Nurturing a personal rhythm of prayer, scripture, and quiet time with God.
Small-group Bible studies that create real community and accountability.
Serving one another and our city with practical love and sacrifice.
Sunday gatherings anchored in verse-by-verse expository preaching.

wide.description: Sharing the gospel boldly across Thika county — 100,000 people goal.
Transforming six sectors of society: family, government, business, education, arts, and media.
Raising 10,000 Christ-followers outside the Chapel walls.
Planting new congregations in Malindi and Vipingo.

leadership.name: Pastor Patrick W.
leadership.bio: Patrick leads Trinity Chapel Thika with a passion for expository preaching and community transformation.

leadership.name: Pastor Eustus Njima
leadership.bio: Eustus shepherds TC Thika's Quest ministry, connecting with youth and young adults across Thika.

leadership.name: James King'ara
leadership.bio: James oversees discipleship pathways, helping members grow deeper in their walk with Christ.

leadership.name: Emanuel Mwakughu
leadership.bio: Emanuel keeps TC Thika running smoothly, serving the congregation with humility and excellence.
